scripts.dev: concurrently -n web,game -c green,cyan "npm run dev:web" "npm run dev:game"
scripts.build: npm --workspace @kids-play/shared run build && npm --workspace @kids-play/web run build && npm --workspace @kids-play/game run build
scripts.typecheck: npm --workspace @kids-play/shared run build && npm --workspace @kids-play/web run typecheck && npm --workspace @kids-play/game run typecheck
